benchmark_results.notes: TP4 MoE baseline. Serve instability: ~30% startup success rate due to Triton GDN prefill kernel TP4 fork race condition. max-model-len override causes 100% failure.
Phase 2b: spawn + OMP_NUM_THREADS=1. REGRESSION -18.8% vs 2a (522.62). OMP=1 hurts MoE dispatching.
TASK_QUEUE_ENABLE=1 harmful for eager mode: -18.9% vs spawn baseline
